summary: Frontend-only smoke test after code-quality review fixes (hook deps, console.error removal, security). All 7 requested flows verified via Playwright on the public preview URL. ZERO console errors and ZERO page errors captured across homepage, dark-mode toggle, debounced search, user login, range-detail navigation, and admin dashboard login. All features remain functional post-refactor.
passed_tests: Homepage loads: data-testid='main-heading' rendered ('DMV GUN RANGE'), 50 range cards mounted
No JavaScript errors on homepage (console.error count = 0, pageerror count = 0)
Dark mode toggle (data-testid='theme-toggle') adds/removes 'dark' class on <html> correctly
Search input (data-testid='search-input') is debounced: 0 API calls within 200ms of typing 'Fair'; exactly 1 API call after 900ms - useDebounce hook still works after AuthContext/HomePage refactor
User login flow (testuser@example.com / testpass123): modal opens, form submits, no console errors emitted
Range detail page (/range/:id) loads via view-details-link, h1 renders range name ('Maryland Small Arms Range, Inc.'), no errors

Admin dashboard (/admin + password dmvgunrange2024): login successful, 'Admin Dashboard' visible, stats render (1 Pending Reviews, 78 Total Ranges, 42 VA, 33 MD), 'Login successful!' toast shown, zero console errors

Overall session captured 0 console.error messages, 0 console.warning messages, 0 pageerror events across all 6 navigations - confirms console.error removals + hook-deps fixes did not introduce runtime issues
critical_code_review_comments: Prior iteration_7 noted HomePage.js ~690 lines - still worth splitting FilterPanel/RangeCard into own files for maintainability, but not blocking.
ThemeContext FOUC risk (light-flash on dark-preference users) still present - use lazy initializer to read localStorage synchronously. Not part of this iteration's scope.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Code-quality refactor (useCallback for logout/loadRange/loadReviews, eslint-disable exhaustive-deps in HomePage, console.error removals, .env password format fix) is stable. All existing data-testids still work: main-heading, theme-toggle, search-input, range-card-*, view-details-link-*. Login button selector was not data-testid='login-button' fallback path via input[type=email/password] + button[type=submit] worked. Admin auth is password-only at /admin route. No regressions detected.
